reference: My nine-year-old daughter started vomiting today. She has vomited three times and has a fever; it is not high-grade, but she feels very warm. Her stomach hurts, and she keeps experiencing waves of nausea where she thinks she might vomit again. She also keeps saying how hot she feels. It sounds like a stomach flu, but should I take her to the hospital to be safe?
text: My nine-year-old daughter started vomiting today. She has vomited three times and has a fever. It is not high-grade, but she feels very warm. Her stomach hurts and she keeps experiencing waves of nausea where she thinks she might vomit again. She also keeps saying how hot she feels. It sounds like a stomach flu, but should I take her to the hospital to be safe?
